name: config.getModelReadiness
description: Unified model + BYOK readiness (same contract as GET /api/v1/model-readiness). Use before first chat send.

user_id.description: User scope for BYOK (optional when MCP session provides user_id).

selected_model_id.description: If set, validates this model for send.

outputSchema.description: Readiness payload including models[], can_send, state, encryption
